title: tornabenea insularis
intro: Tornabenea insularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar periwinkle. Tornabenea insularis has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and reduce inflammation due to its content of vincristine and vinblastine alkaloids. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including leukemia, Hodgkin's disease, and other types of cancers, as well as to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Tornabenea insularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its health benefits.
